name: Last Laugh
overview: Funhaus, Achievement Hunter, and Rooster Teeth are sending their top comedians to the ultimate challenge. Armed only with a duffel bag of props and their wit, the battle is on to be the last contestant standing - without laughing, while host and referee Geoff Ramsey watches on.

trailers.title: Demon Llamas and A Pants Off Dance Off | Official Last Laugh Trailer
